Verified Petition To Validate 2004 Trust; Invalidate 2012 Trust & Gift Deed And To Set Aside Conveyance Of Real Property
Off Calendar Mar-17-2021 Continued To Jul-12-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jim Price appeared by zoom for Petitioners.
Gilbert Jay appeared by zoom for Beulah Lynnette Jenkins and Edward Jenkins (Respondents).

Mr. Price stated that they are ready to be sent out to the master calendar for a two to three-day trial, that the only thing left to do is some expert depositions and suggested a trial date in June. Mr. Jay suggested setting the trial one month later. The Petition to Validate 2004 Trust, etc. is set for trial in the Department of the Presiding Judge (206) on July 12, 2021 at 9:30 a.m., (order for the same signed in open court).

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Conference

Verified Petition To Validate 2004 Trust; Invalidate 2012 Trust & Gift Deed And To Set Aside Conveyance Of Real Property
Off Calendar Jan-06-2021 Continued To Mar-17-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jim Price appeared by zoom for Petitioners.
Gilbert Jay appeared by zoom for Beulah Jenkins and Edward Jenkins (Respondents).

The Court stated that it read the joint status report, that it looks like some discovery still needs to be done and asked if the parties have a time estimate for completion of discovery. Mr. Price stated that they need 30 to 60-days and that they don't have a lot of discovery that remains to be done. Mr. Jay stated that 30 to 60-days is okay with him and that he is ready to go to trial. The Court informed the parties that a trial of this length will be referred out to Department 206. The Petition to Validate 2004 Trust, etc. and the case management hearing are continued to March 17, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: S. Park. Not reported.

Verified Petition To Validate 2004 Trust; Invalidate 2012 Trust & Gift Deed And To Set Aside Conveyance Of Real Property
Off Calendar Nov-09-2020 Continued To Jan-04-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jim Price appeared by zoom for Petitioners.
Gilbert Jay appeared by telephone for Beulah Jenkins and Edward Jenkins.

Mr. Price stated that they had mediation on Friday, but the case did not settle and that the appointment of a Guardian Ad Litem for Johnanna Myles has been accomplished. Mr. Price also stated that since then, Ms. Myles has passed away, that they are in the process of applying for appointment of a Special Administrator in her estate, that they had court in Contra Costa County, but the matter (Ms. Myles' Estate) was continued to December 10, 2020, and that they have done quite a bit of discovery, but there is still some clean up discovery and expert discovery to do. Mr. Jay stated that he is ready to go to trial. Mr. Price stated that he is not in a position to pick a trial date and that they need to resolve the issue in Contra Costa County first. Mr. Price also stated that he has no personal knowledge of some of the questions that are being raised by Contra Costa County, that he believes Mr. Jay's Client has information and that he is asking for Mr. Jay's assistance. The Petition to Validate 2004 Trust, etc. is continued to January 4, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed the Parties to look for an order regarding filing of a joint status statement.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares.

Verified Petition To Validate 2004 Trust; Invalidate 2012 Trust & Gift Deed And To Set Aside Conveyance Of Real Property
Off Calendar Jan-27-2020 Continued To Apr-27-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jim Price for Petitioners.
Gilbert Jay for Beulah Jenkins and Edward Jenkins (Respondents).

Mr. Price stated that he is waiting for approval of the appointment of a Guardian Ad Litem for Johnanna Myles, that he filed the ex parte application in September and that the capacity declaration that was requested was provided in November. Mr. Price also stated that the second amended petition has been answered, that the Guardian Ad Litem for Johnanna has provided a waiver of notice of the second amended petition and that they need a trial date. Mr. Jay requested a trial date after March. Both Counsel indicated that they have some discovery to do. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than April 10, 2020. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by April 20, 2020. The Petition to Validate 2004 Trust, etc. is continued to and the Parties are to return on April 27, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. A joint status report regarding discovery, any alternative dispute resolution, who the witnesses will be and time estimates of witness testimony, and the overall time estimate of the trial is to be filed by April 20, 2020.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Anasse. Not reported.

Off Calendar May-29-2019 Continued To Jul-24-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jim Price for Petitioners
Gilbert Jay for Respondents

The Court inquires as to the status of this matter and whether they are interested in mediation or ready for trial. Mr. Price stated since the deposition was taken and some documents were produced, he will fill an admendment to the petition, and Mr. Jay has depositions scheduled for his clients before July 24th.

The Verified Petition to validate 2004 Trust, etc. is continued to July 24, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 at which time parties will be ready for trial or mediation.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Verified Petition To Validate 2004 Trust; Invalidate 2012 Trust & Gift Deed And To Set Aside Conveyance Of Real Property
Off Calendar Mar-06-2019 Continued To May-29-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jim G. Price for Damon Wilson (Petitioner).
Gilbert Jay for Beulah Lynnette Jenkins and Edward Jenkins (Respondents).

The Court requested an update. Mr. Price stated that he understood that trials in this department are set at a maximum of two half days only, that their trial will go a full 4 or 5 days, that one of the petitioners will be entitled to preference due to their age, and they need to conduct a lot of discovery. Mr. Jay stated that it took Mr. Price some time to get this matter back on track, that he was allowed to amend, that they responded to discovery timely, that when the amended petition was filed they responded timely, and that the petition is finally on track. Mr. Jay also stated that he is not opposed to proceeding with discovery, that they filed a lis pendens against his client's property, that it's costing his clients a lot of money to have him represent them, that at this point he'd advised his clients that ADR is in their best interest, and that under those circumstances the matter should be set out 60-90 days for a case managment conference/trial setting conference. Mr. Price responded stating that Mr. Jay asked the Court to stay discovery, that the Court did not stay discovery, that Mr. Jay has had a year to do the discovery, and that they want a meaningful mediation. Mr. Jay stated that there is one single family dwelling worth $1,000,000.00 or $1,200,000.00, that he'd need discovery with regard to interrogatories, request for production of documents, and that he'd need to take the depositions of the petitioners. The Court noted that the clients haven't agreed to ADR. The Court then continued the matter to May 29, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a case management conference/trial setting conference. The Court stated that the matter was continued with the understanding that counsel will do discovery and that at the next hearing either the matter will be set for trial or referred to mediation.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy K. Chan. Matter not reported.

Off Calendar Aug-13-2018 Continued To Nov-19-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jim Price for Damon Wilson.
Gilbert Jay for and with Ed Jenkins and Beulah Jenkins (Respondents).

Mr. Price stated that they have not had a chance to discuss mediation, that they have discussed the need to do some discovery, that he may amend his petition and that they need to conduct discovery in order to have meaningful mediation. Mr. Jay stated that he would like to see the amended petition prior to agreeing to a discovery schedule. Mr. Price stated that he can have his amended petition filed within 30-days and suggested 90 to 120-days for a status date. Mr. Jay stated that it is too far out and suggested 60-days. The Petition to Validate 2004 Trust, etc. is continued to November 19, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of discovery.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
